text_zh: 看起来他们玩得很开心！很棒的礼物主意！

text: So it’s kind of like a little kids version of the Xbox Kinect? But cheaper? Seems like it…definitely considering
text_zh: 所以它有点像小孩子版的Xbox Kinect？但是更便宜？看起来是这样…我肯定在考虑

text: How many games come with it?
text_zh: 里面自带多少游戏啊？

text: wow such a great idea for Christmas too
text_zh: 哇，这个想法圣诞节也太棒了吧

text: My kids love this too! We play with it daily!
text_zh: 我的孩子们也喜欢这个！我们每天都玩！

text: We just got ours a couple days ago - kids are obsessed and it’s perfect on this rainy day
text_zh: 我们前几天刚买了我们的——孩子们非常着迷，在这样的雨天玩太完美了

text: I want one of these!
text_zh: 我想要一个这个！

text: This is really cool!
text_zh: 这太酷了！
